title: AI Yearbook 90s
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into an authentic 1990s yearbook portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an authentic 1990s American high school yearbook portrait. Preserve the subject's identity, age impression, facial structure, eye direction, expression, hairstyle silhouette, and natural skin texture. Reframe only as needed into a centered head-and-shoulders school portrait with a blue-gray studio gradient backdrop, soft flash lighting, slightly warm film tones, subtle 90s styling, and a clean professional yearbook finish. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, changed identity, different age, asymmetrical eyes, distorted face, low resolution, blurry, extra fingers, extra limbs, cropped head, modern fashion, futuristic clothing, cyberpunk, text, watermark, logo, overexposed, underexposed, heavy makeup, extreme beauty filter, duplicated features, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. senior portrait, blue laser backdrop...
